rationale: The revision faithfully implements frozen v12 Task 2 as presented. The three registries have exact membership and private-Set read-only facades, including correct forEach facade exposure and throwing mutators. Canonicalization, exact schemas, paths, headings, all locator content bindings, the commit exception, source refs, assertion coupling, node identity, and document keys conform. Edge validation requires the exact caller payload, validates explicit 64-hex node IDs against the supplied locator descriptors, applies the endpoint matrix using locator kinds, enforces supersedes provenance, and rejects ledger-owned fields. Repository derivation invokes the exact commands, distinguishes malformed shallow output from genuine shallow history, strictly validates one lowercase 40-hex root, and is covered by both injected branches and the required cleaned-up real-git shallow/full-clone fixture through a private no-shell allowlist. The implementation has only the authorized public exports, uses ESM and Node stdlib with zero runtime dependencies, and introduces no Task 4a wrapper or other scope expansion.
